text:
Welcome to the stage! is a single by Yoko Takahashi. The single was published by King Records via its label KING with the catalog number KICM-1747, it was released on 22 March 2017. https://vgmdb.net/album/65667 The cover was illustrated by Moyoco Anno. It is part of the GODZILLA vs EVANGELION collaboration.
